title: ourisia coccinea subsp. elegans
intro: Ourisia coccinea subsp. elegans, also known as red fox, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Ourisia genus, a group of flowering plants native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Ourisia coccinea subsp. elegans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
